pr.title: Add data progress measures to report

summary: Adds top-level total_data/matched_data/complete_data measures to report.json (sourced from dtk's build config loadable-section sizes) so decomp.dev can render the Data progress bar, syncs README/progress.json with the new data denominator, and hardens gen_decomp_report.py against stale/partial local builds silently shrinking the reported function/unit denominator.
decomp_lessons: decomp.dev's Data progress bar requires total_data/matched_data/matched_data_percent (and complete_data variants) in report.json's top-level measures; these were previously omitted entirely (all-zero fields are proto3-JSON-omitted) which meant the Data bar simply didn't render.

The data denominator (1,276,195 bytes) comes from build/GC6E01/config.json (dtk-generated build config), filtering to loadable data/rodata sections and explicitly excluding bss/sbss section objects by name/object substring match, since decomp.dev tracks loadable data, not BSS.

Data bytes are counted (denominator) but matched_data/complete_data are deliberately kept at 0 -- data symbols are not yet promoted into source-owned diffable units, so reporting any nonzero matched-data would be fabricated progress.

A real risk this PR guards against: running gen_decomp_report.py locally against a partial/incomplete build/GC6E01/base can silently produce a report with a SMALLER function/unit denominator than the committed one, which would look like a regression when pushed; the tool now refuses to overwrite in that case unless --allow-denominator-shrink is passed explicitly.
smart_moves: Split fuzzy_match_percent into two fields: the new blended fuzzy (over code+data) that decomp.dev consumes, plus a separate code_fuzzy_match_percent that preserves the pre-existing code-only meaning, avoiding a silent semantic change to the primary progress metric.

_check_denominator_shrink() compares old vs new total_functions/total_units before overwriting report.json's output path and hard-exits with a clear message if the new denominator is smaller, protecting against accidental local-build regressions being pushed as if they were real.

key_files.role: Adds _loadable_data_size() (reads build config, excludes bss/sbss), extends _measures()/build_report() to emit total_data/matched_data/complete_data, adds --allow-denominator-shrink guard against partial local builds overwriting a fuller committed report.
Now carries total_data=1,276,195 (matched_data=0) alongside existing function/code measures so decomp.dev renders a Data bar at 0%.
Sanity checks extended to validate matched_data<=total_data and complete_data<=total_data alongside existing function/code sanity checks.
Updated to keep README/progress.json data-denominator lines in sync with the new report.json data fields.
